reviews.comment:
Este mes comencé a ser socia vitalicia, por tanto hace muchos años que estoy en contacto con el club. Siempre me pareció genial, siempre encontré allí la solución a todos mis problemas. Felicito a las autoridades y a todos los empleados. Son gente que sabe trabajar con la gente. Siempre dan de ellos, lo mejor. Estoy orgullosa de ser socia. Felicitaciones!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
This month I became a lifetime member, so I've been involved with the club for many years. I've always thought it was fantastic; I've always found solutions to all my problems there. I congratulate the board and all the staff. They are people who know how to work with people. They always give their best. I'm proud to be a member. Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdzVHY2lRRRAB
